description: Branch 6c four-error cancellation chain (Finding F1 / section 2.4). Starting from the originally-locked hybrid recipe, each step removes one compounding error; the coherent single-source recipe on Talu's calibration (Olson) geometry reproduces the corrected reference. Every value is traced to committed evidence in 'source'; nothing here is hand-set.

chain.step: locked hybrid: IZA structure, 12 A tail-off, Talu Ar-O + active framework Si (the silicon double-count)
remove the double-counted silicon: pure Talu oxygen-only, still IZA, still 12 A
converge the cutoff: 24 A + analytical tail, still IZA
Talu's calibration (Olson) geometry: coherent single-source recipe

reference.source: Dunne 1996, K_H = B/kT (corrected; superseded the mis-derived 0.224)
